detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	112學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 觀光英文 (English for Tourism)	開課班級 : 應英二	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 周晏安	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
The course intended to integrate Taiwan's local cultural into English language learning. Students will be able to 1. strengthen their English ability to introduce the famous landmarks or spotlight around Taiwan. 2. develop their language ability to work as English Tour Guide. 3. improve their oral/Spoken competitiveness in the filed of Tourism. 4. to polish their English ability and cultural awareness in real practice.  


2.教學綱要
The course is designed to promote students' tourism industries or cultural understanding and oral ability to introduce Taiwan beautiful attractions to foreign tourists. Conversation interaction in the classroom will be applied by exploring different activities

6.成績評定及課堂要求
1. Class Participation 30% (15% Class attendance: active participation, overall preparedness, skill development, etc; 15% In-class pair/group involvement) 2. Quizzes & Homework 20% 3. Midterm mini-group oral presentation 25% 4. Final group oral presentation 25% 
1. Self-respect at all aspects. 2. No any smart phone allowed. 3. Absence or any late work will not be graded unless you’ve made prior arrangements with the professor. 
Extra credit with blue card for : 1. Early bird 2. Active learners with volunteer involvement
